description: Returns the talkback stream URL and audio configuration for a specific camera

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("POST", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/cameras/{id}/talkback-session", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Create talkback session for camera
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/cameras/{id}/talkback-session"
    method: POST
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/cameras/{id}/talkback-session", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Create talkback session for camera
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/cameras/{id}/talkback-session"
    method: POST
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
